'''Ur'Ru'r''' was a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]]. He accompanied his fellow tribesmen [[URoRRuR'R'R|URoRRoR'R'R]] and [[RR'uruurrr]] on a hunt in the [[Jundland Wastes/Legends|Jundland Wastes]] where they had captured [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].
